PETITION TO STAY CIVIL PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANTS, MOVING PARTIES: PUBLIC HEALTH FOUNDATION ENTERPRISES, INC.; DAS-DOUGLAS, DR. MOUPALI; AND DEIDRE SANTOS. Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Civil Proceedings; Declarations Of Danielle Gonzalez And Jamie Katzman In Support
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PUBLIC HEALTH FOUNDATION ENTERPRISES, INC., DR. DAS-DOUGLAS, and, DEIRDRE SANTOS'S Petition to Compel Arbitration and Stay Civil Proceedings. Appearances: Jamie Katzman, Esq., of SilverFreedman, (310) 282-9400, appearing for Defendants, Public Health Foundation Enterprises, Inc.; Das-Douglas, Dr. Moupali; and Deidre Santos, and moving party; Philip G. Allingham, Esq., of Liberson & Wolford LLP, (415) 677-4110, appearing for Plaintiff, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and adds to its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to compel arbitration Granted. Petition to stay civil proceedings is granted as to Defendants, moving parties: Public Health Foundation Enterprises, Inc.; Das-Douglas, Dr. Moupali; and Deidre Santos. Arbitration will take place in San Francisco, Discovery allowed; Plaintiff not to bear any additional forum costs; and, the Court declines to make any further orders regarding the selection of an Arbitrator. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
